description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named test-p4c-debian that runs on every push to main, on pull requests to main, and on merge groups to main. The workflow has three ubuntu jobs: test-ubuntu22, test-ubuntu22-tofino, and test-ubuntu20, each checking out the repository, using ccache, building with GCC, and running tests with ctest. The jobs differ in their environments, test configurations, and Ubuntu versions.
